title: Carl Icahn owns 4% stake in International Flavors & Fragrances, sources say
text: Carl Icahn owns 4% stake in International Flavors & Fragrances, sources say

title: IFF And SleepScore Labs Develop Fragrance That Targets Sleepless Nights
text: IFF and SleepScore Labs have partnered to develop a scent that will help consumers get a better night's sleep based on science and data and creativity.
